prompt:
A small stack of sterile adhesive bandage strips fanned out on a tabletop, with a few still sealed in their individual paper wrappers and one partially peeled open to show the padded center. The wrappers use simple color blocks and a cross icon in place of readable branding. In the background, a faint glimpse of a first aid kit case or other medical items hints that these strips are part of a larger emergency setup.

Near-future solarpunk medical aesthetic with clean, soft lighting and a neutral, uncluttered background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible text. The composition should clearly identify these as everyday adhesive bandages, distinct from more complex medical gear.
